programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: For his 200th rescue, Jon rescues a family who bought a Mexican restaurant at the height of the pandemic and put their daughter's future on the line to chase the bright lights of Vegas.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer heads to Kenosha, Wisc., to rescue a long-standing bar whose owner has failed to update the business over the past 30 years.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A married couple's dream of a successful art-themed bar is in jeopardy, so Jon Taffer steps in to help in Douglasville, Georgia. Their passion for art is undeniable, but their lack of business acumen is leading to failure.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Titanic
programme.desc: Two young lovers from different backgrounds meet and fall in love on the ill-fated maiden voyage of the unsinkable R.M.S. Titanic.

programme.desc: In Hickory, N.C., Jon finds a bar with an absent owner, an untrained staff, and an infestation of pests.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer arrives just in time to save a family run bar on the brink of ruin with an aggressive father at its helm.

programme.title: Inside Edition
programme.desc: His family claims that he went in to have his spleen removed, but the doctor mistakenly removed his liver instead.

programme.desc: A cockroach infestation plagues a grotesque rock bar in Austin, Texas.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: Anything You Can Yell, I Can Yell Louder
programme.desc: Taffer tries to calm the sparks between three loud-mouthed firefighting brothers struggling to keep their Queens bar afloat.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: Grandpa Got Run Over by His Grandkids
programme.desc: A bar owner's adult grandchildren use it as their own personal playground.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Two cancer scientists struggle in their attempts to apply the perfect formula needed in order to run a successful bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Customers bring their own alcohol and women flash the patrons at a Tennessee bar.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Taffer settles the score between two feuding bar owners, one with his foot out the door and the other with his marriage on the line.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: A third generation bar owner in Milwaukee put his father's legacy on the line by living off his family.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: Stix and Stones May Break Your Bar
programme.desc: After a decade of success, a drag racing bar owner sees his profits go up in smoke.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Chef Jason Santos goes to Chesterfield, Minnesota to rescue an owner who drinks excessively in his own bar while his kids try to make the bar successful.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon helps an owner who battled childhood illness and the loss of his father learn how to run a bar and manage a business.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer visits Fond du Lac in Wisconsin to help a husband and wife rescue their bar and move on from the death of their son.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Jack Reacher
programme.desc: One morning in an ordinary town, five people are shot dead in a seemingly random attack; all evidence points to a single suspect: an ex-military sniper who is quickly brought into custody; Reacher, an enigmatic ex-Army investigator, believes the authorities have the right man but agrees to help the sniper's defense attorney.. However, the more Reacher delves into the case, the less clear-cut it appears.

rating.system: Saskatchewan Film and Video Classification Board
Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Top Gun: Maverick
programme.desc: After more than 30 years of service as one of the Navy's top aviators, Pete "Maverick" Mitchell is where he belongs, pushing the envelope as a courageous test pilot and dodging the advancement in rank that would ground him. Training a detachment of graduates for a special assignment, Maverick must confront the ghosts of his past and his deepest fears, culminating in a mission that demands the ultimate sacrifice from those who choose to fly it.

rating.system: Dirección General de Radio, Televisión y Cinematografía
Instituto Nacional de Cine y Artes Audiovisuales
Instituto de Cinematografía y de las Artes Visuales

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: Yo-Ho-Ho and a Bottle of Dumb
programme.desc: Jon patches holes in a sinking pirate-themed bar in Silver Spring; he forces the bar's staff to cater to the city's corporate clientele.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: When Taffer returns to Second Base Bar and Grill to find an owner has let the bar deteriorate, he must decide if he will save it once again.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon must save a bar or it could cost a husband and wife both their business and their marriage.

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: After the tragic loss of his mother, the owner of this British pub has coped poorly by drinking away profits and gambling his way to ruin with weekly poker tournaments.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Taffer rescues a successful bar, the beacon of a community, that was destroyed by flooding in Louisiana.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon Taffer has his hands full convincing big-time bar persona and co-owner Rick Roundhouse that he is part of the reason why his business is failing.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.sub-title: A Bar to Take Pride In
programme.desc: A gay bar in Las Vegas is on the verge of closing after losing all of its entertainment options due to the Covid-19 pandemic.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação

programme.title: Bar Rescue
programme.desc: Jon sends hospitality protégé Dustin Drai to Glendale, Arizona, to rescue a local institution whose current owner is treating the bar as his personal hangout and giving away free drinks.

rating.system: Departamento de Justiça, Classificação, Títulos e Qualificação
